name: Bardroy
description: Bardroy, usually referred to as Bard, is the household cook of American descent. Bard gruffly treats everything as though it's a military exercise, often referring to troops, enemies, and weaponry when he goes off into one of his many long-winded speeches about what it truly means to appreciate the culinary arts. He rarely produces anything edible as he uses weaponry such as a series of flamethrowers, each more extravagant than the last to cook and believes cooking is an art requiring explosions

He likes to tease and refers to beautiful women as his "kittens." When push comes to shove, however, he is very dedicated to putting criminals behind bars. He drinks coffee constantly. description: One of Zen's close Aides. He was first introduced to Zen when he was 17 by Zen's brother, the first prince, Izana. Mitsuhide is one with an outgoing and honest personality. He shares a close relationship with Zen and can often be seen having a friendly banter with each other. He was once described as 'protective' by Kiki, another close aide, towards Zen.

name: Shao May
description: Shao May is May Chang's pet panda and traveling companion. Abandoned as a cub due to her abnormally small size, Shao May was cared for by May as if she were family and, therefore, has a particularly strong bond with the little girl. The two are constantly together and, as a bit of comic relief, Shao May frequently mimics May's actions whether it be in expression, practicing alkahestry or performing martial arts, taking whatever pose her master takes and moving in synchronized union with her. -Wi

name: Steven A. Starphase
nativeName: スティーブン・Ａ・スターフェイズ
description: __Occupation:__ Fang Hunter Steven Alan Starphase is Libra's second-in-command. A shady man with many connections, and a genius of deception and intuition. Seemingly laid back, he gives off an air of a suave businessman, always with a quip or sardonic comment to make about the situation. When crossed, however, he shows a ruthless side, and is not above using his connections to make 'problems' disappear. name: Yuuri Wakasa
description: Yuuri Wakasa is one of the main characters of the Gakkou Gurashi! series. She is a former student at Megurigaoka Private High School. As the big-sister figure, Yuuri is the president of the School Life Club, where she is more commonly referred to as "Rii (-san)". She keeps a detailed record of food, electricity, lessons, and other resources and activities. Yuuri is usually very calm and mature, and acts in a collected and proper manner. name: Akira  Shiroyanagi
description: __Ability__: Possesses whichever ability the other person thinks he has. Akira Shiroyanagi is a high schooler who loves games and Konpeito. He is bored with his everyday life and hence tries out many games hoping to find something to challenge him. This changes when he suddenly is dragged into a battlefield by a mysterious girl who calls herself Mion. name: Asahi Shiina
description: __Swim Style:__ Butterfly Asahi Shiina was the first year junior high student who debuted in the second volume of the light novel High☆Speed! written by Kouji Ouji. He is said to have a bright personality and is a luck-pusher and always wanted to become the captain of the swimming club.

name: Ayumu Aikawa
description: __Height__: 175 cm (5'8") He was murdered by a serial killer and and brought back to life as a zombie by Eucliwood Hellscythe, a Necromancer of the underworld. The Necromancer now resides with him, improving in his combat skills as he attempts to track down the killer who murdered him.

name: Otabek Altin
nativeName: オタベック・アルティン
description: Otabek is a 18-year-old Kazakh figure skater. He is generally stoic and tends to be introverted, preferring to spend time alone rather than with other skaters. While he himself is shy and quiet, his skating is very eloquent and expressive. He is hugely popular in Kazakhstan and is considered a national hero. (Source: Yuri!!! On Ice Wikia)
